semantic.role: Lightweight HTTP server that serves generated .spine view pages (Markdown→HTML) for local browser preview during development.
responsibilities: Starts an HTTP server on a user-configurable port (default 7899) for browsing generated view documentation.
Converts Markdown files from the .spine/pages directory to HTML using a subset Markdown-to-HTML converter embedded in the module.
Serves static files (HTML, SVG, JSON, etc.) from the root of the .spine directory.
Handles error responses with 404 (file not found) and 500 (internal errors).
Returns the http.Server instance to allow callers to gracefully stop the server.
outOfScope: Does not provide real-time file watching or hot-reload — pages are static snapshots.
Does not implement authentication, authorization, or CORS policy.
Does not proxy or serve content outside the .spine directory.
Is not intended for production deployment; lacks load balancing, caching, or security hardening.
invariants: The server port must be configurable; default is 7899.
The server must serve files from the .spine directory specified in ViewServerOptions.
Markdown files must be converted to HTML before sending to clients.
The server must handle multiple concurrent requests.
The server must handle errors gracefully without crashing the process.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a self-contained local HTTP server for previewing generated .spine documentation views as a developer convenience.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor to remove legacy CLI aliases; rebuild documentation; fix schema and tests. No direct impact on this file.

publicSurface.description: Starts a lightweight HTTP server that serves generated view pages from the .spine directory; returns the http.Server instance for external shutdown control.
Configuration interface containing the path to the .spine directory (spineDir) and an optional port number (port, defaults to 7899).
